'''Neil Barani''' was the co-owner and chief engineer of the [[Yen-2]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony. In order to provide [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Stipling]] with information about [[Sprax]]'s connections to [[Jatayus Outbound]], [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]], and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], he created the [[Barani List]]. Due to the failure of selling the list, Barani [[Death/Legends|killed]] himself.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]'' {{1stm}}
